introduction: Gill, lovable and merry, works as a mall Santa Claus and absolutely loves everything about it. When his ex-boyfriend, Jason, unexpectedly shows up with his newly adopted son, Gill's jolly world erupts into chaos. He is forced to face his past in the most awkward and public of settings, causing him to question what truly matters most in his life. All the meanwhile, he must desperately attempt to save face as the perfect Santa Claus.
